Name: CrashGuard
Author: CrashGuard
Description: Monitor and control CrashGuard services from your Stream Deck.

Actions.Name: Canary Status
Actions.Tooltip: Red if a canary type has triggered since acknowledged, yellow if at risk, green if clear. Press to view recent triggers, long-press to acknowledge and clear red.

Actions.Name: Canary Graph
Actions.Tooltip: Scrolling bar chart of resolved (green), at-risk (yellow), and triggered (red) canaries for one or more canary types.

Actions.Name: Canary Metrics
Actions.Tooltip: Shows resolved (green), at-risk (yellow), and triggered (red) counts for one or more canary types over a configurable time window.

Actions.Name: Trigger Control
Actions.Tooltip: Fires a CrashGuard action, such as restarting a service or acknowledging an alert.

Actions.Name: Canary Dial
Actions.Tooltip: Rotate to cycle between triggered, resolved, pending, and average resolution time bar charts for a canary type over the last interval. Press to refresh.
